sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

bibl.abbr: VARĀH. BṚH. S. 2, S. 4, Z. 18. fg.

cit.quote: <L>242825<pc>1208,1<k1>sAra<k2>sA/ra<e>1A ¦ (= <hom>1.</hom> <s>SAra</s>) a piece at chess or backgammon &c.<info lex="inh"/> <LEND>

<L>108632<pc>7-0945<k1>sAra<k2>sA/ra<h>2

<div n="1"> 1) <lex>m.</lex> <lex>n.</lex> <is>gaṇa</is> {#arDarcAdi#}
zu <ls>P. 2,4,31.</ls> <ls>SIDDH. K. 249,b,4.</ls> am Ende eines <ab>adj. comp.</ab> <lex>f.</lex> {#A#} .

<div n="2">— g) {%ein dem Temperamente eines Menschen zu Grunde liegender Hauptbestandtheil des Körpers%}: es werden deren acht oder auch nur sieben angenommen: {#sattva#} (fehlt bei
<ls>VARĀH.</ls>), {#Sukra, majjan, asTi, medas, mAMsa, rakta#} und {#Sukra#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,125,11. 126,18.</ls> {#tvaksAra#} <lex>adj.</lex>
<ls n="SUŚR.">127,3.</ls> <ls>CARAKA 3,8.</ls> <ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 68,1.</ls> <ls n="VARĀH. BṚH. S. 68,">96.</ls> <ls n="VARĀH. BṚH. S.">69,21.</ls> {#rakta˚#} <lex>adj.</lex>

<ls n="VARĀH. BṚH. S. 68,">100.</ls> <ls>LAGHUJ. 2,13. fgg.</ls>

<ls>SUŚR. 2,421,5.</ls>
<div n="2">— i) {%das Rechte, Richtige%}; <ab>neutr.</ab> = {#nyAyya#}
<ls>AK.</ls> <ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> {#nEtatsAram#} <ab>Comm.</ab> zu <ls>TS. PRĀT. 14,5.</ls>
{#tadasAram#}
zu <ls n="TS. PRĀT.">1,21.</ls>

<ls>R. GORR. 1,46,19.</ls> {#sAraM juzAM caraRayoH#}

<ls>Spr. (II) 2347.</ls> <ls n="Spr. (II)">5776.</ls> — Die Lexicographen kennen noch folgende nicht zu belegende <ab>Bedd.</ab>

<div n="1">— 4) <lex>adj.</lex>
<div n="2"> a) {%hart, fest, stark%}: {#˚druma#}
<ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 43,58.</ls> {#˚dAru#}
<ls n="VARĀH. BṚH. S.">54,118.</ls> {#DanuzI#}
<ls>R. GORR. 1,77,14.</ls> {#˚puNKa#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 10.</ls> {#˚gAtra (˚yoDa#} <ls>ed. Bomb.</ls>)
<ls>MBH. 6,3316.</ls>
<ls>SUŚR. 1,151,5.</ls> <ls>CARAKA 3,8.</ls> {#maDusUdana#}
<ls>HARIV. 5794.</ls> {#ye tu garBANkurAH sArAstAndivyAnparvatAnviduH#}
<ls n="HARIV.">11446</ls> (die neuere <ab>Ausg.</ab> hat eine andere Lesart). {#bala#} {%Kerntruppen%} (<ab>Gegens.</ab> {#Palgu#})
<ls>MBH. 2,1031.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">5,2205.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 5,">2516. fg.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 5,">5244.</ls>
<ls>KĀM. NĪTIS. 18,58. 19,59.</ls> <ls>Spr. (II) 5966.</ls> <ls>MĀRK. P. 122,18.</ls>

<ls>DAŚAK. 84,11.</ls>

<ls>AK. 3,4,25,173.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls> {#sarvavedodDftaH sAro mantraH#}
<ls>Verz. d. Oxf. H. 106,a,32.</ls> {#sUkta#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 4,22,17.</ls>
<ls>PAÑCAR. 1,5,22.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) mit einem <ab>instr.</ab> {%voller%}: {#SukreRa = SukrasAra#} <ab>adj. comp.</ab> {%Samen zum Hauptbestandtheil im Körper habend%}
<ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 69,33.</ls>
<div n="2">— e) = {#SAra#} {%bunt, scheckig%}: {#maRqUkaH kfzRaH sAraH#} ({#kfzRasAraH?#}) {#kuhakaH#}
<ls>SUŚR. 2,290,6.</ls> {#sAraH SabalaH kfzRaScAsO sAraSca kfzRasAraH kfzRamfgaH#}
<ls>MALLIN.</ls> zu <ls>KUMĀRAS. 3,36.</ls> nicht {%schwarz und scheckig%}, sondern {%in dem das Schwarze vorwaltet.%} — {#sAraniyuktaM#}
<ls>HARIV. 4530</ls> wohl fehlerhaft für {#sADunirvyUhaM#}, wie die neuere <ab>Ausg.</ab> liest. <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#a˚#} ({%werthlos, nichtig%} auch
<ls>MBH. 14,597.</ls>
<ls>KATHĀS. 36,105.</ls>
<ls>BHĀG. P. 7,5,26</ls>), {#aguru˚#} ({%das Harz der Aquilaria Agallocha%}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,183,15.</ls> <ls n="SUŚR.">2,175,4.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 6,8</ls>), {#agra˚, adri˚, antaH˚#} ({%innerer Gehalt%}
<ls>Spr. (II) 350.</ls>
[Page7-0948]
{%inwendig hart, — fest%}
<ls>VARĀH. BṚH. 3,7</ls>), {#amBaH, arTa˚, aSma˚, kaM˚, karka˚, kAla˚, kusuma˚, kfzRa˚, kzIra˚, ganDa˚, gAyatri˚, giri˚, Gana˚, candana˚#} (auch
<ls>R. 2,78,6</ls>), {#carma˚, takra˚, tantu˚, tantra˚, taru˚, tIkzRa˚, tfRa˚, tvak˚, tvaci˚, dravya˚, DAnya˚, naya˚, niH˚, nIti˚, piNga˚, picCila˚, pIta˚, pIlu˚, puRya˚, puzkarasArI, puzpa˚, prapaYca˚, prayoga˚, prARa˚#} ({%Lebenskraft%}
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 6,368</ls>), {#bahu˚, bindu˚, bimbi˚, Badra˚, BAgavata˚, BAvasAraviveka, BAvanAsArasaMgraha, BUta˚, BUzaRasAradarpaRa, majjA˚, maRi˚, mada˚, manaH˚, mahA˚, mAMsa˚, mADvasidDAnta˚, meGa˚, moca˚, yajYa˚, yaTAsAram, yudDa˚, yoga˚, rakta˚, laGu˚, lokabindu˚, vajra˚, vasu˚, vAkya˚, vAri˚, viveka˚, viSva˚, veda˚, vezwa˚, vEdyakasArasaMgraha, vEyAkaraRaBUzaRa˚#} (unter {#vEyAkaraRaBUzaRa), vyavahAra˚, vyAKyA˚, SAla˚, SilA˚, SuBa˚, SEla˚#} (auch
<ls>KIR. 10,14</ls>), {#SyAma˚, Sveta˚, sakalavedopanizat˚, saMkzipta˚#} (unter {#saMkzipta), saMgIta˚, samara˚, samudra˚, sarva˚, sita˚, sidDAnta˚#} .
<LEND>

<L>124335<pc>7-120-b<k1>sAra<k2>sA/ra<h>2 <hom>2.</hom> {#sA/ra#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 <lex>m.</lex> <lex>n.</lex> (<ab>adj. Comp.</ab> <lex>f.</lex> {#A#}) <div n="2">— a〉 {%die inneren, festen Bestandtheile eines Körpers%}. Bei Früchten so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%Kerngehäuse%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%Festigkeit, Härte; Stärke, Kraft%}. Als relativer Begriff auch so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%Schwäche%}. <div n="2">— c〉 {%Werth%}. {#sAratas#} {%dem Werthe nach%} {#viBavasAreRa#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%nach den Vermögensumständen%} <ls>HEMĀDRI 1,747,15. 760,19</ls>. <div n="2">— d〉 {%Vermögen, Besitz, Reichthum%}. {#sAratas#} {%nach den Vermögensumständen%}. <div n="2">— e〉 {%Kern,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%Hauptsache, Quintessenz, das Beste, Werthvollste, etwas Werthvolles%}. {#sArAtsAram#} {%das Allerbeste%}. Am Ende eines <ab>adj. Comp.</ab> {%das Vorwaltende, Hauptsache%}. <div n="2">— f〉 {%ein dem Temperament eines Menschen zu Grunde liegender Hauptbestandtheil des Körpers%} (deren 8 oder 7). <div n="2">— g〉 {%Bestandtheil%} <ab>überh.</ab> <div n="2">— h〉 {%Nektar%}. <div n="2">— i〉 {%saurer Rahm und *Butter%} (<ls>RĀJAN. 15,2</ls>). <div n="2">— k〉 {%verdickter [Page7-120-c] als Räucherwerk verwandter Pflanzensaft, Harz%}. <div n="2">— l〉 {%Dünger%}. <div n="2">— m〉 {%Wasser%} <ls>VĀSAV. 105,2</ls>. <ab>Vgl.</ab> <ls>ZACH. Beitr. 42</ls>. <div n="2">— n〉 {%ein Fürst, der einem anderen im Kriege zu Hülfe kommt, Bundesgenosse%}. <div n="2">— o〉 bei dem <is>Maga</is> <ab>Bez.</ab> {%des Gürtels%}. <div n="2">— p〉 in der Rhetorik {%eine Art Klimax%}. Beispiel <ls>Spr. 2347</ls>. <ls n="Spr.">5775</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 *<lex>m.</lex> = {#majjan#}, {#asTi#}, {#tvacisAra#}, {#vajrakzAra, vAyu, roga#} und {#pASaka#}. <div n="1">— 3〉 *<lex>f.</lex> {#sArA#} = {#kfzRatrivftA#} und {#dUrvA#}. <div n="1">— 4〉 <lex>f.</lex> {#sArI#} = *{#sArikA#}, {#pASana#} (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#sArIkrIqA#}) und *{#saptalA#}. <div n="1">— 5〉 *<lex>n.</lex> = {#nacanIta, lOha#} und {#vipina#}. <div n="1">— 6〉 <lex>Adj.</lex> (<lex>f.</lex> {#A#}) <div n="2">— a〉 {%hart, fest, stark%}. {#bala#} <lex>n.</lex> so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%Kerntruppen%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%kostbar, werthvoll%}. <div n="2">— c〉 {%der beste, vorzüglichste%}. <div n="2">— d〉 {%richtig%}. <div n="2">— e〉 mit einem <ab>Instr.</ab> so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%voller%}. <div n="2">— f〉 = {#SAra#} {%bunt, scheckig%} <ls>KĀD. 142,14</ls> ({#SAra#} <ls n="Chr.">250,4</ls>). <LEND>

<L>30150<pc>1118-c<k1>sAra<k2>sAra {#sAra#}¦ {%<ab>a.</ab>%} [{#sf-GaY, sAr-ac vA#}] {@1@} Essential. {@--2@} Best, highest, most excellent; <ls>Mu. 1. 13.</ls> {@--3@} Real, true, genuine. {@--4@} Strong, vigorous. {@--5@} Sound, thoroughly proved. {@--6@} Highest or best (at the end of <ab>comp.</ab>); {#trivargasAraH#} <ls>Ku. 5. 38.</ls> {#--raH, --raM#} (but usually {%<ab>m.</ab>%} only except in the first {4} senses) {@1@} Essence, essential part, quintessence; {#snehasya tatPalamasO#} <lbinfo n="praRa#yasya"/> {#praRayasya sa#} <ls>Māl. 1. 9</ls>; <ls>U. 6. 22.</ls> {#asAre Kalu saMsAre sArametaccatuzwayam . kASyAM#} {#vAsaH satAM saMgo gaMgAMBaH SaMBusevanaM ..#} <lbinfo n="ls:Dharm.+14"/> <ls>Dharm. 14.</ls> {@--2@} Substance, pith. {@--3@} Marrow. {@--4@} Real truth, main point. {@--5@} The sap or essence of trees; as in {#KadirasAra#}, [Page1119-a+ 56] {#sarjasAra#}. {@--6@} Summary, epitome, <lbinfo n="com+pendium"/> compendium. {@--7@} Strength, vigour, power, energy; {#sAraM DaritrIDaraRakzamaM ca#} <lbinfo n="ls:Ku.+ 1. 17"/> <ls>Ku. 1. 17</ls>; <ls>R. 2. 74.</ls> {@--8@} Prowess, heroism, courage; <ls>R. 4. 79.</ls> {@--9@} Firmness, hardness. {@--10@} Wealth, riches; {#gAmAttasArAM#} <ls>R. 5. 26.</ls> {@--11@} Nectar. {@--12@} Fresh butter. {@--13@} Air, wind. {@--14@} Cream, coagulum of curds. {@--15@} Disease. {@--16@} Matter, pus. {@--17@} Worth, excellence, highest perception. {@--18@} A man at chess. {@--19@} Impure carbonate of soda. {@--20@} A figure of speech corresponding to English ‘climax’; {#uttarottaramutkarzo#} {#BavetsAraH parAvaDiH#} <ls>K. P. 10.</ls> {@--21@} The heart. {#--rA#} {@1@} Dūrvā grass. {@--2@} Kuśa grass. {#--raM#} {@1@} Water. {@--2@} Fitness, propriety. {@--3@} Wood, thicket. {@--4@} Steel. {@--Comp.@} {#--asAra#} {%<ab>a.</ab>%} valuable and worthless, strong and weak. {#--(raM)#} {1} worth and worthlessness. {2} <lbinfo n="sub+stance"/> substance and emptiness. {3} strength and weakness. {#˚vicAraH#} <lbinfo n="considera+tion"/> consideration of strong and weak points &c. {#--gaMDaH#} sandal wood. {#--grIvaH#} <ab>N.</ab> of Śiva. {#--jaM#} fresh butter. {#--taruH#} the plantain tree. {#--dA#} {1} <ab>N.</ab> of <lbinfo n="Sa+rasvatī"/> Sarasvatī. {2} of Durgā. {#--drumaH#} the Khadira tree. {#--BaMgaH#} loss of vigour. {#--BAMqaM#} {1} a natural vessel. {2} a bale of goods, merchandise. {3} implements. {#--mitiH#} the Veda. {#--lohaM#} steel. <LEND>
<L>9651<pc>1513<k1>sAra<k2>sA/ra {@sā́ra,@}¦ <ab>n.</ab>, {%die innere feste Masse%} (eines Baumes), {%Kernholz%}. <div n="TS">-am khadirásya {287,19}. <LEND>

<L>7520<pc>321<k1>sAra<k2>sAra sāra m., n. <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">jádro věci, substance, hlavní část, pevnost, síla</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">сущность дела, субстанция, главная часть, прочность, сила</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">the core of a thing, substance, the essential part, firmness, strength</lang> <LEND>
